subject: fix(audit): comprehensive 9-trigger parallel audit sweep
body:
Ran all 9 audit triggers (review, audit, docs, mobile, clean, perf, sec,
debug, improve) in parallel and applied fixes across all categories.

Deduplication: Extracted shared head content and skip link into partials
(head-common.html, skip-link.html), extended htmlPartials Vite plugin.
Security: Added CSP meta tags, fixed isSafeUrl percent-encoding bypass,
added projectName validation, theme validation against known lists.
Accessibility: Added prefers-reduced-motion support (WCAG 2.1 SC 2.3.3),
focus management on tab switches, scrollbar-gutter layout shift fix.
Error handling: Added doc file fetch timeouts, timeout vs 404 error
differentiation with retry button, copy failure feedback, descriptive
catch block comments in pwa.js.
Cleanup: Removed 30+ inline onclick handlers (delegated), unused CSS
(animate-fade-in, data-delay 5), build console.log.
Performance: Non-render-blocking Google Fonts loading.
Improvements: Build-time meta.json validation plugin, markdown renderer
CSS classes in main.css replacing inline Tailwind strings in JS.

Tags: audit, security, accessibility, cleanup, performance, deduplication
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: parallel-audit-sweep
Semver: minor

title: comprehensive 9-trigger parallel audit sweep
